name: Texas Bank And Trust Company
description_short: Texas Bank and Trust is an FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, savings, mortgages, treasury management, and wealth management services across Texas.
description_long: Texas Bank and Trust (TBT) is a regional bank providing comprehensive financial services to individuals and businesses throughout Texas, with a focus on the Dallas-Fort Worth and East Texas markets. The bank is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, offering deposit protection up to regulatory limits. The company offers a broad range of products including personal checking accounts (including MyFree Checking), personal savings accounts, business checking and savings accounts, VISA debit cards, mortgages, lines of credit, business loans, treasury management services, and wealth management services. They provide digital banking available 24/7, merchant services through multiple platforms (FirstView, goEmerchant, NMI Virtual Terminal), retirement plan administration, and credit card services with rewards programs (Scorecard Rewards). TBT differentiates itself through personalized service relationships with both individual and business customers, experienced treasury management professionals, and a dedicated wealth management team focused on creation and preservation of wealth. The bank emphasizes understanding customer needs and providing tailored solutions rather than one-size-fits-all products. Their business positioning focuses on understanding business-specific goals and operational cash flow management. As a regional bank, TBT provides traditional banking services with FDIC protections and local relationships, but customers should note that investment products offered through their wealth management division are not FDIC-insured, not guaranteed by the bank, and may decrease in value. The bank maintains standard banking hours with select locations open Saturdays.
services: Business savings and money market accounts
VISA credit cards with rewards (Scorecard Rewards)
Business lines of credit and working capital loans
Merchant services (FirstView, goEmerchant, NMI Virtual Terminal)
Retirement plan administration and participant services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
MyFree Checking account with no apparent monthly fees
24/7 digital banking availability alongside in-person branch locations
Treasury management services with dedicated professionals for business customers
Comprehensive wealth management services for both individuals and businesses
Multiple business loan products including working capital lines of credit
VISA debit card and rewards-based credit card programs (Scorecard Rewards)
Merchant services through multiple platforms for business customers
cons: Investment and wealth management products are not FDIC-insured and may lose value
Regional bank with limited to East Texas and Dallas-Fort Worth service area
Business loans and treasury management services require approval and likely credit evaluation
Website provides limited detail on specific APRs, fees, or product terms without contacting bank
best_for: Small to medium-sized Texas businesses needing treasury management and working capital solutions
Texas residents seeking local banking relationships with FDIC-insured deposit products
Individuals and business owners interested in comprehensive wealth management and financial planning
diagnosis: Texas Bank and Trust is best for Texas-based individuals and small-to-medium businesses seeking FDIC-insured banking with personalized service and comprehensive financial solutions including treasury management and wealth planning. Primary caveat: investment products are not FDIC-insured and may decline in value, and services are geographically limited to Texas markets.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, savings, mortgages, treasury management, and wealth management services across Texas.
